regional_cost_note: Cabinet makers in Whangārei typically charge $1,600–$3,200/m run for custom kitchen cabinetry, $900–$2,700/m for custom wardrobes, and higher rates for commercial joinery. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. Lead times for custom joinery are typically 8–14 weeks — factor this into your project schedule.
